title: Evidence of giant serpent ‘Vasuki’ found in Gujarat: 47-million-year-old fossil reveals 50-foot predator
description: A massive prehistoric snake named Vasuki indicus has been discovered in Gujarat. Fossilized bones suggest this ancient serpent lived 47 million years ago. It may have stretched up to 50 feet, rivaling the largest snakes known. This discovery sheds light on India's potential role in the origin of giant snakes. The findings are based on 27 fossilized vertebrae.

title: Fossil Group (NASDAQ:FOSL) Stock Rating Lowered by Wall Street Zen
description: Fossil Group (NASDAQ:FOSL – Get Free Report) was downgraded by research analysts at Wall Street Zen from a “hold” rating to a “sell” rating in a research note issued to investors on Saturday. A number of other analysts have also recently commented on the stock. Northland Securities started coverage on shares of Fossil Group in [...]

title: Fossil fuels no longer offer security. Clean energy can
description: While historical energy crises spurred renewable adoption, current economic conditions like inflation and high interest rates pose investment challenges. Despite these obstacles, growing public support and the undeniable security benefits of renewables are driving continued progress.

title: Dales walk with suspension bridge, ancient fort, abandoned mines and stunning views
description: Harkerside Moor to the south of Reeth is teeming with history. Ancient history at Maiden Castle, more recent industrial remains, and all framed by lovely views down this part of Swaledale.

title: Visiting Kano? Here is what you will find in this ancient city
description: Kano offers ancient walls, royal history, dye pits, markets, and cultural landmarks for travellers visiting Northern Nigeria.
